name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way you expected

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.5 -->
- Node version: <!-- node -v -->
- Browser (if a UI bug):
- Did you point VoidSpark at a repo containing an `autoresearch/` folder? <!-- yes/no -->

## Logs / screenshots

Paste relevant terminal output, the browser console, or screenshots. For API
issues, include the route (e.g. `/api/ideas`) and the JSON response.
